title: Christmas Day And Every Day
content:
Star high,
        Baby low:
        'Twixt the two
        Wise men go;
        Find the baby,
        Grasp the star--
        Heirs of all things
        Near and far!
meaning:
"Christmas Day And Every Day" is a quintessential example of George MacDonald's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
